full_text:
Yan Shi 嚴世
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Shi (嚴世). Tried to shoot Sima Yi down but stopped by Sun Qian. Yan Shi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
